faqs.question: What pests are commonly treated with general pest control in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service in Piscataway targets the most common household pests including ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, centipedes, and occasional invaders like stink bugs and beetles. We also address mice and rats as part of comprehensive treatments. The service includes interior and exterior treatments with follow-up visits as needed.
